prompt: "A candid, sun-drenched outdoor photograph of a joyful young woman with long, wavy brown hair, laughing and looking upward in pure delight while cradling a fluffy, light-brown bunny close to her chest. She is seated on a grassy lawn behind a low white picket fence, with lush green hedges, a large tree trunk wrapped in fairy lights, and an elegant outdoor party or garden event softly blurred in the background under bright, natural daylight."
